custom_nodes.description: Load and run GLM-OCR (zai-org/GLM-OCR) locally in ComfyUI. Supports text recognition, formula recognition, table extraction, and general image description. Picks up models from any ComfyUI checkpoint directory.

custom_nodes.author: Premik

custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI node for patching images using a difference detection algorithm. It detects changes between two images (original and patched), creates a mask of the differences, and merges them back together with configurable blending.
